task: Using only the embedded packet, perform a launch-quality robustness review of the QAOA parameter landscape. Identify robust parameter regions, rank provided records by technical and economic impact, run the specified 5% sensitivity check on parameters and objective values, mark any contradictory or under-supported records as needs_review, and recommend one of: hold, release, retest, or mitigation per record. Produce an executable notebook (qaoa_landscape_review.ipynb) containing formulas, validation checks, record-level citations, and sensitivity logic, plus a human-readable optimizer_note.md summarizing methods, findings, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
